Tests the `Math.atan2` function with `-Number.MIN_VALUE` and `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It checks that when `Math.atan2` is called with `-Number.MIN_VALUE` as the first argument and `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` as the second argument, the result is `-Math.PI`. This test ensures that the `Math.atan2` function correctly handles edge cases involving very small negative numbers and negative infinity, confirming compliance with expected mathematical behavior.
